subject: refactor(ui): migrate all form inputs to DaisyUI component classes
body:
Replace hand-rolled Tailwind form styling with DaisyUI component classes
across all form input types. Custom CSS was unreliable (wrong pseudo-element
names, browser-specific hacks) and inconsistent across components.

Migrated:
- 5 checkboxes (StyleTab) → checkbox checkbox-primary checkbox-sm
- 2 selects (StyleTab) → select select-bordered select-sm
- 5 text inputs (4 files) → input input-bordered input-sm
- 3 textareas (3 files) → textarea textarea-bordered textarea-sm

CSS cleanup:
- Removed accent-color checkbox hack (DaisyUI handles via --input-color)
- Removed blanket transition:all on form elements (caused jank, conflicts)
- Narrowed focus-visible to exclude DaisyUI-classed elements (no double outline)
- Added DaisyUI form input guidelines to CLAUDE.md AI Notes

Tags: ui, daisyui, forms, cleanup, docs
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
